name: index_search
description: Searches interaction logs and indexes for context retrieval using keyword-based indexing.

parameters.query: Keyword or phrase to search for
parameters.max_results: Maximum number of results to return (default 10)
parameters.file_path: Path to index file (optional, defaults to config.INDEX_PATH)

output: List of matching interactions with timestamps and summaries
usage: Used in llama_model_manager.py for function call simulation; supports context augmentation.
